about.title: About Me
about.intro: Hi, I'm Kaiyang. I'm a software engineer passionate about creating beautiful and intuitive user experiences through web and iOS development.

background.title: Background
background.description1: As a recent graduate turned software engineer, I'm at the beginning of my exciting journey in tech. With less than a year of professional experience, I've already discovered my passion for creating engaging user interfaces and seamless user experiences.
background.description2: I split my time between frontend web development and iOS app development, constantly learning and exploring new technologies in both domains. I believe in writing clean, maintainable code and creating applications that users love to interact with.

frontend.title: Frontend Development
frontend.description: Modern web frameworks, responsive design, and user experience

ios.title: iOS Development
ios.description: Native iOS apps, SwiftUI, and mobile user interfaces

uiux.title: UI/UX Design
uiux.description: Creating intuitive and beautiful user interfaces

projects.title: Current Projects
items: Building this personal blog using Next.js and TailwindCSS
Learning SwiftUI and developing my first iOS app
Exploring modern frontend frameworks and best practices
